name: devbrother-skills
description: DevBrother agent skills for clarifying requirements and generating AGENTS.md governance systems.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for clearer AI agent work and project rules.
interface.longDescription: A small collection of DevBrother agent skills. deep-interview clarifies goals, scope, constraints, and done criteria before implementation. agents-md generates an AGENTS.md governance system and links CLAUDE.md for Claude Code compatibility.
defaultPrompt: Use deep-interview to clarify this rough idea.
Generate AGENTS.md project rules with agents-md.
Set up agent governance for this repository.
